channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cruise ship evacuates 3 amid suspected hantavirus concerns
item.description: Health officials are investigating a potential hantavirus cluster. A case was also confirmed in an ex-passenger.

item.title: Iran: Pakistan PM thanks Trump for pausing ship escorts
item.description: President Trump announced Project Freedom on Sunday, stating the Navy would ensure ships safely navigate restricted waters.

item.title: Brazil school attack: Student kills two women
item.description: Authorities report a 13-year-old student is responsible for an attack at a Rio Branco school, resulting in two fatalities.

item.title: Poll Shows Favorable Views of Pope, Negative Reaction to Trump's Post
item.description: A recent poll reveals American perspectives on Pope Leo and reactions to a post by Donald Trump.
